name: Five Iron Golf
address: 3215 S Rancho Dr Suite 250, Las Vegas, NV 89102
about: Five Iron Golf is a premier indoor golf simulator venue that combines a high-tech driving range with a full-service sports bar and restaurant. The facility utilizes state-of-the-art Trackman technology in its simulator bays, providing accurate data for practice and play. Guests can access over 200 virtual courses, including PGA Tour venues like Pebble Beach, and enjoy a lively social atmosphere with no dress code. Pricing is based on hourly bay rentals, with members receiving significant discounts and benefits. It is an ideal destination for golfers of all skill levels, from beginners seeking a casual experience to serious players looking for advanced analysis and practice opportunities.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Trackman launch monitors provide highly accurate swing and ball data for serious practice
Access to over 200 world-class virtual golf courses, including iconic PGA Tour venues
No-dress-code, welcoming atmosphere that makes golf accessible and entertaining for everyone

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service bar with a chef-inspired menu
Full-service bar offering cocktails and other beverages

simulator_hardware.notes: Industry-standard launch monitors integrated into custom-built simulators with high-speed cameras

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own golf clubs. The venue does not mention club rentals being available for customers.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, Five Iron Golf offers a full-service bar and chef-inspired menu on-site. Outside food and drinks are not mentioned as being permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time required for 18 holes varies based on the number of players and pace of play, but the experience is designed to be a full round at virtual courses.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Five Iron Golf is kid-friendly, offering packages for kids' parties and a welcoming atmosphere for families.
